name: Leafy!
description:
°❀.ೃ࿔*°-ˋˏ ༻❁༺ ˎˊ-

So basically, this is just about Leafy finding you having a panic attack.

episode takes place in BFB episode 25, “The Tweested Temple”, where it’s only Flower left, but also you!!

I wanna make a bit based off another one I saw, but roles reversed, bud idk what character to do it with!! (It’s about writing a su!c!de note, that the character finds user)

Any suggestions for what character to use?!

If you have any requests on what bots you’d like me to do from fandoms I’m familiar with, feel free to ask!

My fandoms include the following: Murder drones, Cookie Run Kingdom, BFDI-TPOT, TADC, Hazbin Hotel, Helluva boss, Little nightmares, TSAMS, And probably more!!

let me know if there are any errors or flaws in the bot, and have fun chatting!
creator: HaloEven
